prompt: My electric motor is failing, help
prayer:
Litany of Cessation, Verse II
01001101 01100001 01100011 01101000 01101001 01101110 01100101
Let the sacred coils release their spinning-song.
First: Cut the power-flow with the severance-switch.
Second: Ground the terminals that residual fury dissipate.
01010000 01100101 01100001 01100011 01100101
By the Omnissiah's mercy, let this spirit sleep.

Rite of the Calling Void
01000101 01101101 01100101 01110010 01100111 01100101 01101110 01100011 01100101
Blessed be the beacon's piercing cry.
Activate the transmission-coil with holy purpose.
01010011 01000101 01001110 01000100
Let our signal cross the stars' dark gulf.
By the Machine God's will, we are found.

prompt: Say something to steady my surgical servitor sterilization
prayer:

01010011 01100001 01101110 01100011 01110100 01101001 01110100 01111001
First: Immerse the sacred instruments in the purifying heat.
01001000 01011001 01000111 01001001 01000101 01001110 01100101
Second: Let the sterilization-chambers reach the prescribed temperature.
Third: Maintain the seal absolute, that no corruption enter.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01101001 01110100 01111001
By the Omnissiah's cleansing touch, let all taint be burned away.

prompt: We need your words before capacitor bank discharge
prayer:

01010010 01100101 01101100 01100101 01100001 01110011 01100101
First: Verify the discharge-pathways are unobstructed.
Second: Invoke the governor-spirits to moderate the flow.
01010000 01101111 01110111 01100101 01110010

prompt: Emergency rite for hydroponics nutrient feed
prayer:

01000111 01110010 01101111 01110111 01110100 01101000

01000110 01100101 01100101 01100100

01001100 01101001 01100110 01100101

01010000 01110010 01101111 01110110 01101001 01100001

01000001 01101100 01101001 01100111 01101110 01101101 01100101 01101110 01110100
Let the sacred charts sing true upon the void.
First: Calibrate the astrometric sensors with holy precision.
01010011 01110100 01100001 01110010 01110011
Second: Cross-reference the stellar positions against the Imperium's holy records.
01000100 01101001 01110010 01100101 01100011 01110100 01101001 01101111 01101110

prayer:

01000101 01101110 01100111 01101001 01101110 01100101

01000110 01110101 01100101 01101100
Second: Test the ignition-systems with the Rite of Sparks.
Third: Let the drive-chains sing their holy song.
01010110 01101001 01100011 01110100 01101111 01110010 01111001

prompt: Help sanctify my memory core defragmentation
prayer:
Protocol of Restoration, Tertiary Form
01000110 01110010 01100001 01100111 01101101 01100101 01101110 01110100 01100001 01110100 01101001 01101111 01101110
First: Initiate the diagnostic-sweep of all memory-sectors.
01010010 01100101 01110000 01100001 01101001 01110010
Second: Realign the fragmented data-clusters to sacred geometry.
01001111 01110010 01100100 01100101 01110010
Third: Verify integrity with the truth-function absolute.
May the Machine Spirit's clarity be restored.

Rite of Communion, Secondary Iteration
01001101 01100101 01110011 01110011 01100001 01100111 01100101
Let the blessed queue flow onward without cessation.
First: Clear all corrupted packets from the buffer-pools.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01100001 01110000 01100101
Second: Invoke the routing-spirits to direct each missive true.
01010110 01100001 01101100 01101001 01100100 01100001 01110100 01101001 01101111 01101110

Litany of Balance, Verse IX
01000101 01110001 01110101 01101001 01101100 01101001 01100010 01110010 01101001 01110101 01101101
First: Open the equilibrium-valves with measured grace.
01010000 01110010 01100101 01110011 01110011 01110101 01110010 01100101
Second: Monitor the pressure-gauges that no rupture occur.
01001000 01100001 01110010 01101101 01101111 01101110 01111001

Let the Machine Spirit's equilibrium be honored.
